name: Italian Omelette
method: Serves 6 12 organic eggs 1 tablespoon water salt and ground black pepper 4 heaped tablespoons grated parmigiano 2 large potatoes, boiled and chopped 1 Spanish onion or 2 leeks, chopped 25 g unsalted butter 25 ml good-quality virgin olive oil

Fry the onion or leeks in the butter and oil until transparent and add them and the chopped potatoes to the egg mixture. Put a little oil or butter in a non-stick frying pan, pour in the egg mixture and cook over medium heat for around 5 minutes. Then turn the grill to medium and place the frittata under it. Grill for about 5 minutes or until the frittata is golden-brown. Allow to cool and slide onto a serving dish.
